mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_attendance (employee_id, project_id, work_date, attendance_type, overtime_type, work_hours, remark, created_by) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{projectId}, #{workDate}, #{attendanceType}, #{overtimeType}, #{workHours}, #{remark}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_attendance SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, project_id = #{projectId}, work_date = #{workDate}, attendance_type = #{attendanceType}, overtime_type = #{overtimeType}, work_hours = #{workHours}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name, p.name as project_name FROM tb_attendance a LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON a.project_id = p.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
